# ~/.ssh/config — Add this to your Windows SSH config
# Location: C:\Users\<YourName>\.ssh\config
#
# Allows VS Code Remote-SSH to connect directly into the
# running QEMU ARM64 guest via port forwarding.

Host qemu-guest
    HostName localhost
    Port 2222
    User root
    IdentityFile ~/.ssh/qemu_guest
    StrictHostKeyChecking no
    UserKnownHostsFile /dev/null
